entries.title: Completed Ed-Ready PR 53 org-scoped lab ownership and Save Version foundation
entries.summary: Completed the major Ed-Ready PR 53 implementation and validation pass, expanding Save Version into a broader org-scoped authorization boundary across lab ownership, instruction management, deliverables, LTI launch, and immutable image-version registration.
details: Turned the original Save Version ownership foundation into a wider organization-scoped platform boundary covering org-owned lab definitions, org lab installation, creator/admin/owner authoring roles, public-lab adoption compatibility, and legacy lab backfill safety.
Added creator/admin/owner-gated Save Version registration through POST /api/labs/version, resolving authorization from lab_definition.ownerOrgId rather than trusting caller-supplied organization IDs.

Validated managed ECR image references for immutable lab environment versions, including allowed tag and sha256 digest references, duplicate-version conflict handling, and fail-closed behavior when server image-repository configuration is missing.

Moved lab definitions, instructions, deliverables, and questions onto org-scoped routes while retiring legacy global mutation paths with 410 responses and preventing adopting orgs from editing upstream canonical lab content.

Hardened launch and LTI boundaries by requiring org slug, labId, and instructionId, binding LTI course/context data to an EdReady organization, and only auto-adopting active public labs and instructions through the current compatibility path.

Finished frontend integration for org-scoped create/edit/list flows, active/inactive management states, learner-safe content reads, deliverable controls, visibility publishing, and removal of sensitive form-state logging.

Completed automated validation across lab image/versioning, org-scoped lab definitions, instructions, deliverables, LTI deep-link and launch behavior, createsession, legacy backfill, production build, database generation, TypeScript compile, Pulumi preview, and manual smoke-test coverage.

entries.title: Completed Ed-Ready documentation cleanup and audit
entries.summary: Finalized the Ed-Ready documentation cleanup by refreshing project-level docs, app-specific docs, and the dated documentation inventory before merging the cleanup PR.
details: Refreshed the top-level docs and app-specific docs under lab_platform/docs.
Removed temporary cleanup/audit files after the pass was complete.
Squash-merged the documentation cleanup PR into main.

entries.title: Delivered Embrace Pediatrics client website
entries.summary: Delivered the final clinic website iteration, brought the production domain online, and set up the client's Google Maps business profile.
details: Merged the final website iteration into production.
Connected the custom domain and verified HTTPS.
Set up the Google Maps business profile for the clinic.
